title: WeatherRefind
description: Replaces vanilla rain & snow with improved, more polished particles. Less visual clutter, more atmosphere.
body:
![less mess, more atmosphere](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6725600630b04f9cd0c8b15bde56be8df67c71cd.png)
WeatherRefind — Rain & snow, but better.

WeatherRefined replaces vanilla rain and snow with smoother, more polished particle effects, reducing visual clutter while keeping the atmosphere intact. Particle count, range, and density can all be adjusted to match your preferences.

Client-side only - compatible with any server.

☔ Features:

- Fully replaces vanilla rain and snow rendering
- Custom particle-based weather with smooth fade-in
- Configurable particle count, range, and spawn delay
- Gradual weather transitions with no sudden pop-in

**🌧️ No more** ```/weather clear``` **reflex 🌧️**
